subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the precincts of the Prison, and summoneth thee unto God, the Lord of what hath been and what shall be. Verily, He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یدعوک الی اله رب ما کان و ما یکون انه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
